description: Current Storygate Studio canon must exist and supersede legacy Base44 materials.

Package requires query letter, synopsis, author bio, elevator pitch, agent pitch, market comparables, market category, target audience, market position statement, sample pages, and rights declaration.
notes: Validator enforces required package fields and blocks placeholders before eligibility.
No 8.0 Storygate admission contract is permitted.

description: Current Storygate Studio governance excludes film/screen/adaptation/deck/treatment/producer-facing requirements.
notes: A manuscript may have adaptation potential later, but this is not current Storygate governance.

description: Base44 Storygate materials, if referenced, must be legacy_reference_only and non-binding.
notes: Prevents GitHub/Copilot from treating Base44 as current authority.

description: Only verified publishing professionals/admins may see full listings or request project access.
notes: Verification route is a shell; server enforcement remains missing-critical.

description: Industry access requires creator/admin approval and no automatic access on request.
notes: Concrete route/function not present in this repo snapshot.

description: All state-changing and access actions require structured append-only audit events.

Storygate package intake may consume certified Agent Readiness package output or equivalent professional materials only; renderer/download output, evaluation_report_view_model_v1, uncertified Agent Readiness output, and unresolved AR08/AR09 gap claims are invalid authority.
notes: Registry/test-enforced authority boundary only; does not implement missing Storygate package verification runtime.
